zh.lifeSummary: 當Ursula Richardson於大約1598年出生時，她的父親Sir Thomas Richardson30歲，母親Ursula Southwell30歲。她於1614年6月12日與William Yelverton在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1657年3月20日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年60歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ursula Richardson于大约1598年出生时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Richardson30岁，母亲Ursula Southwell30岁。她于1614年6月12日与William Yelverton在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1657年3月20日在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年60岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Richardson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Richard + -son. This surname is also very common among African Americans. Compare Ritson .
Americanized form (and a Swedish variant) of Swedish Richardsson or Rikardsson: patronymic from the personal name Richard , Rikard.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Richardsen or Norwegian Rikardsen, cognates of 2 above.

variants.name: Richerson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson   or perhaps a patronymic from   Richer  .

variants.name: Richard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Andre, Marcel, Pierre, Leonce, Normand, Camille, Lucien, Gilles, Henri.

English, French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, and Dutch: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements rīc ‘power(ful)’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. The Middle English forms were Richard and Rikard, respectively Parisian Old French and Old Picard pronunciations of the ancient Germanic name. Middle English Rikard gives rise to the pet form Rick , whilst Richard has given the pet forms Richie and Rich . Both produced rhyming pet forms, Dick and Hick for Rikard and Hitch for Richard.

History: The LA Richard families are mainly descended from Acadian refugees in the second half of the 18th century. — This surname is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Richeson
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Richardson  , but compare   Richerson  .

variants.name: Ritson
meanings: variant of Richson, a shortened form of Richardson . The name may sometimes have been confused with or assimilated to Rushton .
in southern England perhaps a habitational name from Ritson, in Halwell (Devon).

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

en.lifeSummary: When Ursula Richardson was born about 1598, her father, Sir Thomas Richardson, was 30 and her mother, Ursula Southwell, was 30. She married William Yelverton on 12 June 1614, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 20 March 1657, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ursula Richardson est née environ 1598, son père, Sir Thomas Richardson, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ursula Southwell, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé William Yelverton le 12 juin 1614, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 mars 1657, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ursula Richardson um 1598 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Richardson 30 und ihre Mutter Ursula Southwell 30. Sie hat am 12. Juni 1614 in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom William Yelverton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. März 1657 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Richardson è nata il circa 1598, sua padre, Sir Thomas Richardson, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Ursula Southwell, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato William Yelverton il 12 giugno 1614, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 20 marzo 1657, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolta a Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ursula Richardsonが約1598年に生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Richardsonは30歳，母Ursula Southwellは30歳であった。1614年6月12日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでWilliam Yelvertonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1657年3月20日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで60歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ursula Richardson(이)가 대략 1598년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Richardson(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ursula Southwell(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1614년 6월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 William Yelverton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1657년 3월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ursula Richardson nasceu aproximadamente 1598, seu pai, Sir Thomas Richardson, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ursula Southwell, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com William Yelverton em 12 de junho de 1614, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de março de 1657, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultada em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ursula Richardson родилась около 1598 г., её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Richardson было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ursula Southwell, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Yelverton 12 июня 1614 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 20 марта 1657 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ursula Richardson nació aproximadamente 1598, su papá, Sir Thomas Richardson, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ursula Southwell, tenía 30 años. Se casó con William Yelverton el 12 de junio de 1614, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 20 de marzo de 1657, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultada en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
